# workflow_file|job_name
ci.yml|typecheck
ci.yml|lint
ci.yml|unit-tests
ci.yml|coverage
ci.yml|secret-scan
ci.yml|ci-summary
policy-gate.yml|policy-gate
required-check-names-guard.yml|verify-required-check-names
agent-dir-guard.yml|enforce-agent-directory-policy
quality-gates.yml|Quality Gates Pipeline
gca.yml|gca-review
compliance-check.yml|Constitution Compliance Validation
